items.title: JACK OWEN Explains Why Butchered At Birth Is His Least Favorite Of The Early CANNIBAL CORPSE Records
items.summary: Owen pointed to 1991's Butchered At Birth as the record he'd consider re-recording, citing both production issues and the pressure surrounding its creation. items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.

items.summary: The post Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com   Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin on December 18th 2025 One of the most anticipated concerts of the year occurred on an absolutely freezing Thursday night, with Kingfishr taking the stage of the 3arena for the first of their two sold out shows.

items.title: Dept of Foreign Affairs offers consular help to Irish citizens impacted by Spanish wildfires
items.summary: The Department of Foreign Affairs has said they are ready to provide consular assistance to Irish citizens in Spain affected by the wildfires, as Minister Helen McEntee has offered her condolences to those who lost their lives in the deadly blazes in Southern Spain
